EmailTemplate.name: Temp CP creation Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Welcome to Runwal Enterprises – Complete Your CP Registration
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Broker__c.Name},
Welcome to Runwal Enterprises!
We are delighted to have you onboard as our valued Channel Partner.
Your Temporary CP Unique ID is: {!Broker__c.RW_Broker_Number__c}
To get started, kindly register yourself through our CP Portal using the link: Portal Onboarding Link
Looking forward to a successful partnership.
Warm Regards,
Runwal Enterprises
